/usr/bin/c++  -mfpu=neon  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/tsl-test.dir/tsl-test_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsl-test.dir/tsl-test-main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsl-test.dir/tsl-test.cpp.o -o tsl-test  /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.2 libtsl-server.a /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.2 /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libQt5Network.so.5.15.2 /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libQt5Core.so.5.15.2
